qdrant_index_rules: Only semantic_layer objects, metric definitions, dimension definitions, query examples, and business terms are embedded
No raw household rows are embedded
No Excel files are embedded as documents
Every Qdrant point must have doc_type, semantic_id, text, and status in payload
Collection vector size must match embedding model dimension
Collection must not be recreated unless --recreate flag is provided
retrieval_rules: Retriever must group candidates by doc_type
Retriever must return LOW_RETRIEVAL_CONFIDENCE if top scores are below threshold
Planner prompt must only receive compact candidates, not the full schema
domain_gate_rules: Every user question must be routed before planning
Dataset numeric/statistical questions must route to DATASET_QA
Definition/explanation questions must route to GENERAL_KNOWLEDGE unless they request dataset numbers
Mixed explanation and data questions should route to HYBRID
Unrelated questions should route to OUT_OF_SCOPE
Low confidence questions should route to CLARIFICATION_NEEDED
query_plan_rules: task_type must be one of allowed enum
metrics must be non-empty for aggregate_query, topk_query, comparison_query
metrics must exist in semantic_layer and status must be ready
dimensions must exist in semantic_layer and status must be ready
filters must reference valid dimensions or measures
topk_query must have sort and limit
output_type must be text or table
sql_rules: SQL must not contain INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, DROP, ALTER, TRUNCATE
SQL must not contain SELECT * unless explicitly allowed
Aggregate query with dimensions must contain GROUP BY
topk_query must contain ORDER BY and LIMIT
All referenced columns must exist in schema_graph
answer_rules: Dataset answers must only use query results
General answers must not invent dataset numbers
Out-of-scope answers must be short and polite
Clarification answers must provide concrete options
